div.h2: Zero-Copy Binary Field Offset Resolution (FlatBuffers Style)

g.title: Total size of this vtable header (2B size + 2B table_size + N*2B offsets)
Size of the actual data table including the vtable pointer preamble

ol.li: VTable Discovery: Read int32 at table_ptr - 4 to find VTable start.
Bound Check: If field_id * 2 + 4 >= vtable_size, return default (Null).
Offset Retrieval: Read uint16 at vtable_ptr + 4 + (field_id * 2).
Existence Check: If offset == 0, field is not encoded (use schema default).
Data Reference: Data exists at table_ptr + offset.

g.text: 1. Byte Alignment: Data fields aligned to natural size (float64 to 8B).
2. Schema Evolution: Append-only field IDs ensure VTable compatibility.
3. Compactness: VTables are shared across identical object instances.
4. Endianness: Little-Endian standard for cross-platform portability.

g.title: Total size of this vtable header (2B size + 2B table_size + N*2B offsets)
Size of the actual data table including the vtable pointer preamble
